info.title: Zoho Analytics API
info.description: API for managing data in Zoho Analytics workspaces and views.

tags.name: User Management APIs
tags.description: Manage User APIs allow you to add, remove, activate, or deactivate users in your Zoho Analytics organization programmatically.

get.description: Returns list of users for the specified organization.

post.description: Add users to the specified organization.

delete.description: Remove users from the specified organization.

put.description: Activate users in the specified organization.
Deactivate users in the specified organization.
Change role for the specified users.

get.description: Returns subscription details of the specified organization.
Returns resource usage details of the specified organization.
Returns list of users for the specified workspace.

post.description: Add users to the specified workspace.

delete.description: Delete users from the specified workspace.

put.description: Update activation status of users in a Zoho Analytics workspace.
Update role of users in a Zoho Analytics workspace.

get.description: Returns list of custom roles for the specified organization.

post.description: Creates a new custom role in the specified organization.

put.description: Updates an existing custom role in the specified organization.

delete.description: Deletes the specified custom role from the organization.

org-id.name: ZANALYTICS-ORGID
org-id.description: Organization ID (can be obtained using Get Organizations API).

scopes.ZohoAnalytics.usermanagement.read: Read user management data in Zoho Analytics.
scopes.ZohoAnalytics.usermanagement.delete: Delete user management data in Zoho Analytics.
scopes.ZohoAnalytics.usermanagement.update: Update user management data in Zoho Analytics.
scopes.ZohoAnalytics.usermanagement.create: Create user management data in Zoho Analytics.
scopes.ZohoAnalytics.usermanagement.all: Full access to user management in Zoho Analytics.
scopes.ZohoAnalytics.fullaccess.all: Full access to all Zoho Analytics features.

domainName.description: Name of the domain to which users are added

role.description: Role to assign (USER, WORKSPACEADMIN or custom role)

domainName.description: Domain name to remove users from
Domain to update user status in
Domain of users whose role is being changed

role.description: New role to assign (USER, WORKSPACEADMIN, or custom)

CustomRole.description: Represents a custom role and its permissions.

CustomRolePermissionsResponse.description: Permissions of the custom role grouped by category.

CustomRoleCreatePermissionsResponse.description: Create permissions returned for a custom role.

CreateCustomRoleConfig.description: JSONObject with configuration for creating a custom role.

accessType.description: Access type of the custom role.

UpdateCustomRoleConfig.description: JSONObject with configuration for updating an existing custom role.

roleName.description: Updated name of the custom role.

accessType.description: Updated access type of the custom role.

CustomRolePermissions.description: Permissions granted to the custom role, grouped by category.
